mission.title: kubescape: use go-gitlog as an alternative to git2go
mission.description:
@dwertent we should check if this is acceptable, since we require a `git` binary in the PATH
(probably OK to assume if you want to scan a git repo, you should have git installed)

benchmark shows we allocate more memory, but we're faster:
```
gitlog
BenchmarkBuildCommitMap-8   	       5	 206852705 ns/op	13889608 B/op	   87819 allocs/op
git2go
BenchmarkBuildCommitMap-8   	       4	 310221194 ns/op	 3428458 B/op	  144074 allocs/op
```
